name: Apple Pancakes-Pat
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------------CIDER SYRUP--------------------------------
1 cup Sugar
2 tablespoons Cornstarch
1/2 teaspoon Pumpkin pie spice
2 cups Apple cider
2 tablespoons Lemon juice
1/4 cup Butter or margarine
Combine Bisquick, cinnamon, egg, and milk until smooth. Mix in grated apple. Spoon batter onto hot griddle using a 1/4-cup measuring cup. Cook until bubbles form, then flip and cook other side until golden brown. Makes about 18 pancakes. Serve with Cider Syrup or desired syrup.
For Cider Syrup: In a saucepan, mix sugar, cornstarch, and spice. Stir in cider and lemon juice. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils for 1 minute. Remove from heat and stir in butter.
